cards.front: What is the time complexity of Brute Force String Matching algorithm
cards.back: O(n^2) because for each character in the target string, we are comparing it with all characters in the text string.

cards.front: What is Sequential Search String Matching algorithm
cards.back: It is a simple algorithm that compares the target string with the text string one character at a time, from left to right.

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Sequential Search String Matching algorithm
cards.back: O(n) because we only need to traverse the text string once.

cards.front: What is the main difference between Sequential Search and Brute Force String Matching algorithms
cards.back: Sequential Search only checks for a single pattern, whereas Brute Force checks for all possible patterns.

cards.front: What is the use of Brute Force algorithm in string matching
cards.back: Brute Force algorithm is used when the pattern is very short or when there are too many patterns to check, due to its high time complexity.
